meaning: n.少女,处女adj.未婚的,纯洁的,处女的,无经验的
examples: "Listen," said the robber maiden to Gerda.
The young man betrothed the neighboring maiden.
Now there was once a maiden whose name was Jorinda.
He took his mother's maiden name Gore and used it as his first name.
Trade was supposed to be the focus of Mr. Li's maiden visit to India.
